new_cascade_issues.title: Power margin reduction
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces power generation capacity, potentially exceeding peak power consumption limits during imaging mode.

new_cascade_issues.title: Mass reduction
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel reduces total payload mass, potentially affecting overall structural dynamics and compliance with mechanical requirements.

new_cascade_issues.title: Thermal balance impact
new_cascade_issues.description: Removing the right solar panel may alter thermal distribution and affect temperature stability across orbital cycles, potentially impacting thermal requirements.

new_missing_tests.activity: Thermal balance test to validate TMM with modified solar panel configuration
new_missing_tests.reason: Removing the right solar panel affects thermal distribution and requires revalidation of thermal models.

new_missing_tests.activity: Shock test per launcher SRS ICD with modified payload configuration
new_missing_tests.reason: Removing the right solar panel changes structural dynamics and requires revalidation of shock response.
